# ClimbOS

ClimbOS is an iPhone-first climbing companion from MesikaLabs for local session logging, climbing notes, beta planning, and offline gym use.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://climbos.mesikalabs.com/)
- [Support](https://climbos.mesikalabs.com/support/)
- [Privacy Policy](https://climbos.mesikalabs.com/privacy/)
- [Terms](https://climbos.mesikalabs.com/terms/)

## Product Positioning

- Offline-first climbing companion.
- Local session logs, wall photos, route notes, and planning data.
- No required account or MesikaLabs backend for the current public positioning.
- Not medical advice, injury diagnosis, or a guaranteed performance tool.

## Contacts

- App support: climbos@mesikalabs.com
- General support: support@mesikalabs.com
- Privacy: privacy@mesikalabs.com
- Legal: legal@mesikalabs.com
